name: runesleo--runesleo-humanizer
description:
Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Detects and fixes 24 common
 AI patterns including inflated symbolism, promotional language, superficial
 analyses, vague attributions, em dash overuse, rule of three, AI vocabulary
 words, negative parallelisms, and sycophantic tone. Based on Wikipedia's
 "Signs of AI writing" guide maintained by WikiProject AI Cleanup.
